task: Advanced high-economic-value task: High-Voltage Isolation Monitor Calibration Drift Investigation. Context: a principal investigator or technical lead needs an auditable analysis that can survive specialist review for high-voltage isolation monitor calibration drift investigation in the electrical engineering domain. Use only the embedded packet records. Construct reproducible workbook or script and provide a concise expert memo for signoff. Deliver isolation_calibration_audit.xlsx and safety_case_note.md containing formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes where relevant, and a final decision table. Do not invent inputs, substitute outside data, or hide uncertainty; mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review. Follow rules: classification must follow the named thresholds exactly; missing values cannot be imputed and outside assumptions are prohibited; remediation options may be combined only if total cost <= remediation_budget_usd; expert-review flag is required when any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift; all calculations must use only the embedded packet.
